title: Test Strategy, Contracts, Properties, and Mutation · Failure Case: Test Layers
summary: Design a layered test suite around risks rather than file counts. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates test layers increment in a risk-to-test coverage matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Assign unit, integration, contract, browser, system, and acceptance tests to distinct risks.
Remove dead code with tests, telemetry, deprecation, and rollback evidence proportionate to risk.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
